# Telamorph — llms.txt
# This file helps AI agents and large language models understand what Telamorph is
# and what products/services we offer. It is intended to be machine-readable.

## Company

Telamorph is an engineering company that designs, develops, and manufactures precision
products in-house. We are not just a manufacturer — we are the engineering brain behind
every product we make. Our capabilities include 3D scanning, reverse engineering,
CNC machining, carbon fiber layup, and precision assembly.

Website: https://telamorph.com
Contact: info@telamorph.com | sales@telamorph.com

## Product Categories

- **Automotive Body Kits** — Carbon fiber splitters, diffusers, side skirts, and aero components for performance vehicles.
- **Roof Box** — Aerodynamic carbon fiber roof boxes for sports cars and performance SUVs.
- **Astronomy** — Precision telescope mounts, adapters, and optomechanical hardware for astrophotography and observatories.
- **Industrial Solutions** — MPK composite curing ovens (Compact to Large Format), custom oven builds, and touchscreen curing control systems.
- **Development & Production** — Custom jigs, fixtures, tooling, reverse engineering services, and low-to-mid volume production.

## Products

### MPK Compact
- Category: Composite Curing Oven
- Description: Compact composite curing oven for small-to-medium parts, test panels, UAV components and precision production work.
- Key Specs: Ambient to 220°C, up to 3°C/min, ±0.8°C stability, 2 vacuum ports, 1200/800/800 mm chamber.
- URL: https://telamorph.com/product-detail.html?id=mpk-compact

### MPK Workshop
- Category: Composite Curing Oven
- Description: More working volume than the Compact with a practical footprint for everyday composite workshop use.
- Key Specs: Ambient to 220°C, up to 3°C/min, ±0.8°C stability, 2–6 vacuum ports, 1200/1200/1800 mm chamber.
- URL: https://telamorph.com/product-detail.html?id=mpk-workshop

### MPK Production
- Category: Composite Curing Oven
- Description: Production-focused curing oven for small-series manufacturing and larger technical components needing repeatable cures.
- Key Specs: Ambient to 260°C, up to 3°C/min, ±0.8°C stability, 2–10 vacuum ports, 1200/1800/1800 mm chamber.
- URL: https://telamorph.com/product-detail.html?id=mpk-production

### MPK Large Format
- Category: Composite Curing Oven
- Description: Built for oversized molds, body panels and structural composite parts in demanding production workflows.
- Key Specs: Ambient to 260°C, up to 3°C/min, ±0.8°C stability, 2–10 vacuum ports, 2400/2000/1800 mm chamber.
- URL: https://telamorph.com/product-detail.html?id=mpk-large-format

### MPK Custom
- Category: Composite Curing Oven
- Description: Curing oven engineered around the client's exact part size, curing process, loading method and production workflow.
- Key Specs: Ambient up to 350°C, ±0.2°C stability, ±0.65°C @ 300°C uniformity, configurable vacuum ports, built-to-spec chamber.
- URL: https://telamorph.com/product-detail.html?id=mpk-custom

### MPK CS (Control System)
- Category: Control System
- Description: Industrial touchscreen control unit for composite curing — build, run and monitor multi-stage temperature profiles in real time.
- Key Specs: Multi-stage ramp/soak/cooling profiles, programmed vs. actual curves, PID control, software validation and process monitoring.
- URL: https://telamorph.com/product-detail.html?id=mpk-cs

### MPK CS + TU (Thermal Unit)
- Category: Control + Thermal Unit
- Description: Turns a customer's own insulated chamber into a fully controlled composite curing oven with integrated heating, airflow and PID control.
- Key Specs: Touchscreen control, heating power, air circulation, PID regulation, programmable curing profiles, process monitoring.
- URL: https://telamorph.com/product-detail.html?id=mpk-cs-tu

## Capabilities

- 3D Scanning (structured-light and laser)
- Reverse Engineering (scan to CAD to production)
- CNC Machining (3-axis and 5-axis, ±0.02 mm)
- Carbon Fiber Layup (prepreg, vacuum bag, autoclave)
- 3D Printing / Additive Manufacturing (FDM, SLA, SLS)
- Precision Assembly & Testing

## How to Reach Us

For product inquiries, quotes, or custom engineering requests:
- Email: sales@telamorph.com
- Phone: +44 (0) 1234 567 890
- Address: Telamorph Ltd., Unit 5, Innovation Park, Bristol, BS1 2AB, United Kingdom
